name: Feature Request

labels: 'enhancement'

---

## 🚀 Feature Summary
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see implemented.

## 💡 Problem Statement
**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is.
Example: "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## 🎯 Proposed Solution
**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## 🔄 Alternative Solutions
**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 📱 User Experience Design
**How should this feature work from a user's perspective?**
- **User Journey**: Describe step-by-step how users would interact with this feature
- **UI/UX Considerations**: Any specific design requirements or considerations
- **Mobile Experience**: How should this work on mobile devices?

## 🎨 Visual Mockups
If you have any wireframes, mockups, or visual ideas, please attach them here.

## 🏗️ Technical Considerations

### Frontend Impact
- [ ] New React components needed
- [ ] Changes to existing components
- [ ] New pages/routes required
- [ ] State management changes
- [ ] API integration required

### Backend Impact
- [ ] New API endpoints
- [ ] Database schema changes
- [ ] Authentication/authorization changes
- [ ] External service integration
- [ ] Performance considerations

## 🌍 Localization Requirements
- [ ] Thai language support needed
- [ ] English language support needed
- [ ] Cultural considerations for Thai users
- [ ] Tourist-focused messaging

## 📊 Success Metrics
**How will we measure the success of this feature?**
- User engagement metrics
- Business value indicators
- Performance benchmarks
- User feedback criteria

## 👥 Target Audience
**Who will benefit from this feature?**
- [ ] Tourists visiting Wang Sam Mo
- [ ] Local business owners
- [ ] Platform administrators
- [ ] All users
- [ ] Specific user segment: _______________

## 🔒 Security & Privacy
**Are there any security or privacy considerations?**
- Data collection requirements
- User permissions needed
- Security implications
- Privacy policy updates

## 📅 Priority Level
- [ ] Critical - Core functionality
- [ ] High - Important for user experience
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have improvement
- [ ] Low - Future enhancement

## 📋 Acceptance Criteria
**What conditions must be met for this feature to be considered complete?**
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3
- [ ] Works on desktop and mobile
- [ ] Thai and English language support
- [ ] Proper error handling
- [ ] User documentation updated

Link any related issues, features, or discussions:
- Fixes #123
- Related to #456
- Depends on #789

Add any other context, research, or information about the feature request here.

If you've seen similar features elsewhere, please describe them.
